physicalDetails.detail: Compact militia captain in hard-used leather with street dust ground into the seams, one shoulder always turned to hold both room and window in the same line of sight.

voiceMarkers.detail: Short, exact, and unadorned. He answers in months, districts, shift patterns, and addresses, with none of the theatrical outrage of a man performing how right he has been.

beliefs.belief: The sickness has been clustering around the grain district for months, and pattern on the street can be more honest than the explanations from above.
If he maps the district precisely enough, command should eventually be forced to acknowledge what he is seeing.
beliefs.trueOrFalse: Disproved institutionally in chapter7, though the maps themselves prove true.

goalsAtChapterEnd.active: Guide the same-night capture by supplying watch turns, access routes, and the lodging-house target for the easier district leader.
goalsAtChapterEnd.underlying: Turn months of ignored district pattern into an actual breach of the hidden cell.

emotionalStateAtChapterEnd.state: Wary but engaged. Suspicion burns off into hard focus once the room proves it can combine his street map with Jaina's arcane one.

decisionsThisChapter.detail: Lets the outsiders in the moment Sylvanas names grain as the trouble and puts his district sheets on the table instead of protecting his pride.
Walks Sylvanas through the granary district in working hours, names the hidden patterns, and gives up the leaders' lodging address plus the watch gap for the night move.

abilitiesDemonstrated.ability: Builds a district case out of dates, doors, sickness clusters, worker routines, and practical lane knowledge no office report could fake.
Reads disguised operatives by discipline, drinking habits, and movement around the covered passage, mapping at least eight cultists and two likely leaders.

howOthersAddressHim.speaker: Sylvanas Windrunner
howOthersAddressHim.pattern: Uses his surname or function with no excess ceremony, treating him as a reliable local specialist once he proves it.

howHeAddressesOthers.pattern: Starts with guarded recognition of her public reputation, then drops into cooperative brevity once grain becomes the topic.

bodyLanguagePatterns.detail: Keeps one hand near his belt knife and his sight lines alive even while talking; his confidence shows as practical room control, not swagger.

knowledge.detail: The first sickness clusters appeared eight or nine months ago, and the same district names kept repeating through bakehouses, delivery hands, and customers.
Eight cultists are certain, three more possible; two of the eight never carry loads and redirect the others after short conversations.
An off-ledger building between the second and third towers is being used despite an empty lease, with a newer lock, a wiped dust line, and night cart traffic through the east lane.

arc.lie: Clean district reports should be enough to make command see what is happening.
arc.truth: Street truth still needs allies willing to act on it.
arc.currentPosition: Chapter7 moves him from harried local officer to trusted inside ally. He still has the same instincts; now they finally have force behind them.
